column1: # Sweep micro_b — Tier B training-side micro-perturbations (500 steps × 1 seed)
# PURPOSE: fast directional screening of training knobs. Each row takes ~8-15 min.
# Kill criterion: |Δ quant_bpb| < σ=0.005 → NOISE. Δ > +0.005 → DEAD. Δ < -0.005 → LEAD → confirm @ 3000×3 seeds.
# Anchor baseline: micro_b_baseline (same config as s32 at 500 iters, seed=42).
# All other rows vary ONE knob. Order designed to interleave baselines for session-drift control.
# Baseline ENV (shared; per-row only OVERRIDES one knob):
# Runs in order — baseline interleaved every 4 rows.
